name: Implement RuntimeCamera3D with Z=0 plane raycasting for viewport input
Build input multiplexer using _UnhandledInput to route clicks between UI and sandbox states
Refactor TrackMeshGenerator for asynchronous mesh and collider rebuilding
Implement CurveCanvasImporter to deserialize JSON and reconstruct Camera Triggers in the scene.
Create a basic CameraTrigger prefab (.tscn) with an attached script for testing the importer.
Add UI controls (Import/Export buttons) to the CurveCanvasEditor dock to execute LoadCanvas and SaveCanvas.
Implement EditorFileDialog for dynamic saving and loading of CurveCanvas levels.
Implement Stroke Batching and EditorUndoRedoManager coverage for Prop Brush and Camera Triggers.
Perform 'Editor Exorcism': Migrate UndoRedo, FileDialog, and UI to runtime-safe equivalents for in-game editing.
Implement Runtime Spline Handles and Tool Selection UI for in-game curve editing.
Wire the runtime editor nodes into CurveCanvasDemo.tscn and resolve UI layout overlaps.
Fix Handle Raycasting: Isolate spline handles to a dedicated collision layer and update multiplexer raycast mask.
Implement Active File tracking (Quick Save) and In-Memory Snapshotting for Play/Edit toggling.
Implement Boot-Time Level Loading to decouple scene data from the .tscn file.
Implement Hybrid Camera Navigation (Mouse middle-click/scroll + Touch two-finger pan/pinch).
Implement Spline Context Menu for Point Deletion and Insertion.
Implement Asset Palette UI to allow dynamically switching the active Prop Brush prefab.
Implement Socket Visualization and 'Attach Segment Preview' tool.
Implement Bezier Tangent Handles for active curve manipulation.
Add Smooth and Sharpen (Linear) tangent controls to the Spline Context Menu.
Implement Sequence Authoring Mode with 3D Spatial Visualization.
Implement ChunkLibrary, base ChunkDefinition resource, and both Authored and Procedural chunk implementations.
Implement Freehand Spline Drawing tool with distance-based point dropping.
Implement Visual/Collider separation and dynamic Mesh Profiles for different Segment Types.
